Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significant renal impairment (markedly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, and microalbuminuria), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin). These findings suggest possible advanced diabetic nephropathy or another chronic kidney disease with poor glycemic control and possible tubular dysfunction. Immediate nephrology and endocrinology evaluation is recommended.
